channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Institutions had ‘diamond hands’ during bitcoin's 50% plunge, Bitwise's Matt Hougan says
item.description: “The wildest thing about my $1 million prediction is that it's not wild at all,” said the digital asset fund manager's CIO.

item.title: Strategy Makes Biggest Bitcoin Buy Yet in 2026 as Preferred Share Demand Surges
item.description: Strategy spent $1.57 billion on Bitcoin last week, notching its largest purchase of the year so far amid heightened demand for STRC.

item.title: How a 2.85% price error triggered $27M in liquidations on Aave
item.description: A small pricing error in wstETH collateral caused $27 million in Aave liquidations, highlighting the critical role of price oracles and automated risk systems in DeFi.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin eyes $75,000, nearing 25% bounce from February bottom
item.description: Gains came for crypto and stocks as tensions around the Strait of Hormuz appeared to ease slightly, sending oil prices lower.

item.title: Prediction markets boom on Iran bets as Congress eyes ban
item.description: Iran-linked contracts drove prediction market activity higher as the CFTC opened rulemaking and Democrats moved to ban war and death bets.

item.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
item.description: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.

item.title: Steven Spielberg Is ‘Not For’ AI Replacing Creatives
item.description: The director of “A.I. Artificial Intelligence” told an audience at SXSW that he’s yet to use the technology in his films.

item.title: Bitcoin outperforms gold and stocks in global turmoil as ETFs and Strategy accumulate
item.description: Wall Street broker Bernstein took note of an institutional ownership shift as behind bitcoin's resilience during this latest bout of global turmoil.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price jumps 8.8%, leading index higher
item.description: Polkadot (DOT), up 8.5% from Friday, joined Ethereum (ETH) as a top performer.

item.title: Crypto wealth platform Abra to go public through $750 million SPAC deal
item.description: The transaction is expected to deliver as much as $300 million in cash, which will be used to expand the company's institutional crypto lending, yield and custody offerings.

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Holds Strong as War Escalates
item.description: Crypto majors continue to outperform all other markets, as Bitcoin ETFs posted their first inflow streak of 2026.

item.title: Bitmine buys 60,999 ether as Tom Lee touts crypto strength amid Iran war
item.description: The ether treasury firm now holds nearly 4.6 million ETH, while maintaining a $1.2 billion cash position despite ramping up acquisitions.

item.title: South Korea fines Bithumb $24M, orders 6-month partial business suspension
item.description: Regulators found 6.65 million AML violations at Bithumb, including 45,772 crypto transfers involving 18 unregistered overseas VASPs.

item.title: U.S., UK, Canada start Operation Atlantic to disrupt crypto approval-phishing scams
item.description: International law enforcement effort targets approval-phishing schemes tied to crypto investment fraud.

item.title: Metaplanet raises $255M and adds warrant structure for Bitcoin buys
item.description: Metaplanet raised $255 million and launched new warrants to fund more Bitcoin purchases as it pushes toward a 210,000 BTC treasury target.

item.title: Bitcoin Hits $74K as US-Iran War Enters Third Week: Here's Why
item.description: Experts remain cautious in the short-term despite Bitcoin’s $74K retest amid escalating geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Crypto needs to put on a business suit
item.description: Crypto’s innovation dazzles but fragments liquidity. Institutions demand boring reliability over novel protocols to move real capital at scale.

item.title: Strategy buys $1.6B in Bitcoin as holdings surpass 761,000 BTC
item.description: Strategy bought 22,337 Bitcoin for $1.57 billion last week, lifting total holdings to 761,068 BTC as it funds purchases through record sales of its STRC preferred stock.

item.title: South Korea’s Hana Financial partners with Standard Chartered on digital assets
item.description: Hana Financial Group will collaborate with Standard Chartered on digital assets following its stablecoin partnership with USDC issuer Circle earlier in March.

item.title: Metaplanet raises $255 million to accelerate bitcoin accumulation
item.description: The Japanese bitcoin treasury firm structured the financing with premium-priced shares and warrants that could unlock up to $531 million.

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy made another huge buy of bitcoin, adding $1.57 billion worth last week
item.description: The company's stack now stands at 761,068 bitcoin, acquired for $57.61 billion.

item.title: SEC drops lawsuit against BitClout’s Nader Al-Naji
item.description: The regulator ended its civil enforcement case accusing the DeSo creator of wire fraud and selling unregistered crypto securities.

item.title: South Korea fines Bithumb $24 million, orders 6-month partial suspension over money laundering violations
item.description: The fine stems from approximately 6.65 million violations related to KYC and transaction restrictions.

item.title: Memecoins outpace bitcoin, ether as 'barbell strategy' wins out
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 16, 2026

item.title: Crypto funds add $1B as three-week inflow streak continues
item.description: Crypto ETPs recorded $1.06 billion in inflows last week, led by Bitcoin and Ethereum, marking three straight weeks of gains despite geopolitical stress.

item.title: Bitcoin hits $74.4K six-week high as analysts see ‘more upside’ for BTC
item.description: Bitcoin’s relief rally pushed its price above the 50-day SMA as analysts say further upside potential is increasing amid rising open interest.

item.title: Altcoins jump as bitcoin inches toward potential $74,000 breakout
item.description: The bitcoin price is approaching a key technical level while PEPE and other memecoins jump more than 10% in a sign of rising appetite for risk.

item.title: Bernstein says Bitcoin rebound reflects more resilient long-term holder base
item.description: ETF inflows and continued corporate buying are gradually reshaping Bitcoin’s ownership structure, Bernstein analysts say.

item.title: $58K BTC price still in play? Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin traders demanded further support reclaims to avoid a return to fresh macro lows next, as BTC price hit six-week highs.

item.title: Ethereum $ETH just signaled the end of the downtrend! For the first time since September, the SuperTrend indicator has flipped from Sell to Buy. In the last two instances, it led to moves of 52% and 174%. What’s happening under the hood: • The Breakout: We - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1rTnA0UXNlWjFIWkV3LTR2Z0tpbEU5LTBzbEVualpJV2pYRnRYUzd2SU5MZk8yRjFyaGRHWlpZUlRsbGV1eFhnX00zT2lhVXN1ZUFNeVB2dk92RWUxTDZF?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum $ETH just signaled the end of…

item.title: Trump-backed WLFI passes proposal letting $5 million stakers buy 'direct access' to team
item.description: The governance vote passed with 99.12% approval from 1,800 voters, with 76% of tokens coming from just 10 wallets.

item.title: Fed headlines central bank rate decisions, Gemini earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting March 16.

item.title: Australian Senate committee backs crypto platform licensing bill
item.description: Australia is moving closer to a new licensing regime that would bring crypto exchanges and tokenization platforms into the Australian Financial Services Licence regime.

item.title: AI data center gold rush sparks debate over impact on Bitcoin mining
item.description: Crypto trader Ran Neuner said Bitcoin could be at risk if AI continues to pull miners away from the network, but others disagree.

item.title: 📊 3 weeks straight of inflows — #BTC & #ETH ETFs are quietly signaling something According to SoSoValue, both Bitcoin and Ethereum spot ETFs have posted net inflows for 3 consecutive weeks, reflecting sustained institutional demand. Price action confirm - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBLQm51T19yeWdTMnZfQjFRLXdDZ1NnbG15cFVTTVFnYkZSSGE1UnR2Mmp5SzcySHRQd2lkZGI0blNQbUxhQVVNeEg0ZUEtZXJhWFc4bHQwNUI4cW9GQ05ldU1VN1FFbTA?oc=5" target="_blank">📊 3 weeks straight of infl…

item.title: SEC drops case against BitClout founder with prejudice
item.description: The regulator filed for dismissal of its case against BitClout founder Nader Al-Naji, after “reassessment of the evidentiary record."

item.title: Balaji calls for more ‘crypto tools’ for refugees amid Middle East tensions
item.description: The former Coinbase CTO says the crypto industry should build more financial tools for refugees and stateless people as conflicts and migration increase worldwide.

item.title: Australian Senate panel backs crypto regulation framework
item.description: The Senate Economics Legislation Committee said the proposed legislation will modernize digital assets regulatory framework.

item.title: The regulatory provisions outlined in the US Digital Asset Market Structure Clarity Act, otherwise known as the CLARITY Act, threaten to give large financial institutions control over crypto, according to Dr. Friederike Ernst, co-founder of the Gnosis blockchain pr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFA4TVZiMmJYd25oSUllSjJVVEVXR0tKOVp6TjF5a093b3BTcHNobzdQYnZhTFdHeTNHVVhxMWhLbHNxN1htdmZTS0ZjMmVyYzc0V1F4QUg0V2hzWFFkNmNZYWJkZUs?oc=5" target="_blank">The regulatory provisions outli…

item.title: FATF 報告書が示すステーブルコイン規制の転換点：流通市場モニタリングの時代へ
item.description: ※この記事は自動翻訳されています。正確な内容につきましては原文をご参照ください。 要約 84% という現実： ステーブルコインは今や、不正な暗号資産トランザクションの 84% を占めています。普及の拡大に伴い、ステーブルコインに特化したコンプライアンスが喫緊の規制課題となっています。 「流通市場」の時代： 規制の焦点は、入出金の監視にとどまりません。FATF は、個人ウォレットを介した P2P トランザクションを含むステーブルコインのライフサイクル全体の監視を求めており、発…

item.title: XRP climbs 3% past $1.47 as breakout extends on broad bitcoin-led move
item.description: Volume jumped more than 250% during the move, with traders watching whether former resistance now turns into support.

item.title: Bitcoin briefly tops $74,000 as ether, sol, ada gains as much as 6% in Monday surge
item.description: Majors posted broad gains on Monday as oil eased from highs, two tankers sailed through the Strait of Hormuz for the first time since the war began, and Trump said the U.S. was talking to Iran.

item.title: Australia warns of AI, ‘finfluencers’ as Gen Z crypto ownership reaches 23%
item.description: Australia’s securities regulator said two-thirds of Gen Z are using social media to make decisions about their financial future, leading to “riskier” financial decisions.

item.title: Early Ethereum builder billΞ.eth( @0xbilly) is also buying $ETH! Wallet 0xf792, linked to @0xbilly, spent $17.46M to buy 7,769 $ETH at an average price of $2,248 in the past 2 hours. intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… - x.com

item.title: Australia Senate Panel Backs Crypto Framework in Latest Regulatory Push
item.description: The proposal would bring crypto platforms and custodians under Australia’s financial-services law, requiring operators that hold client tokens to obtain licences and meet new asset-safeguarding standards.

item.title: WLFI investors nod 6-month token lock-up rule in governance tweak
item.description: WLFI token holders must stake their tokens for at least 180 days to retain voting privileges under the recently passed proposal.

item.title: Bitcoin's price trades above its 50-day average as bullish move gathers pace
item.description: Bitcoin's convincing move above its key average indicates a strengthening of the bullish momentum.

item.title: Crypto trading firm BlockFills files for bankruptcy
item.description: The institutional crypto lender filed for bankruptcy after suspending withdrawals, incurring about $75 million in losses and facing a lawsuit alleging misuse of customer funds.

item.title: US ban on stablecoin yield could see others fill the void: Ledger exec
item.description: Ledger’s Asia-Pacific lead, Takatoshi Shibayama, has added his take as crypto and banks continue to debate whether to allow third-party platforms to offer stablecoin yields.

item.title: BlockFills Entities File Bankruptcy After Withdrawals Halted, Court Froze Bitcoin
item.description: The filings come as the company faces a lawsuit alleging it commingled client crypto assets and refused to return client funds.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin rises above $74,000 and hits its highest level since February 4th. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA0anFnODBVWlFVTGtzNjhZelhtbExNNXd1VTJrUUdqS3lhdGdiZWFOdzRSdDZPTzJvYldoT2pPRldia0ZsX09pVlE2VFg4Z09xeTR5Q1RkRzEyR2c4c1N2emFaek9mdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin rises abov…

item.title: Traders Flip Senate Control Bet as Democrats Overtake Republicans on Kalshi, Polymarket
item.description: Prediction markets tracking Senate control have swung sharply in recent weeks as traders reassess political risk amid escalating tensions in Iran.

item.title: Crypto trading and lending firm BlockFills (operating entity: Reliz Ltd) has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection in Delaware, listing $50–100 million in assets and $100–500 million in liabilities. The move aims to restructure and stabilize operations after su - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin Advances as Oil Jumps Toward $100 on Further Middle East Strikes
item.description: Markets steadied after a volatile weekend, even as oil rose, as traders weighed U.S. strikes on Iranian targets.

item.title: ⚡️ NEW: Vitalik Buterin proposes merging Ethereum's consensus and execution layers into one unified code structure to simplify node setup. - x.com
